content:
1. This Act may be cited as the Federal Territory (Financial
Arrangement) Act 1982.
Payments made under financial arrangement

2. (1)   The Federation shall pay to the State of Selangor all
6                                  Laws of Malaysia                                ACT 266
payments due to be made pursuant to the financial arrangement
agreed to between the Federation and the State of Selangor in respect
of the establishment of the Federal Territory.
(2)  Any payment made by the Federation to the State of Selangor
relating to the establishment of the Federal Territory before the
date of the coming into force of this Act shall be deemed to have
been lawfully appropriated and made under this Act.
Charge on the Consolidated Fund

3. All payments due to be made under subsection 2(1) shall be
charged on the Consolidated Fund.
7
LAWS OF MALAYSIA
ACT 266
FEDERAL TERRITORY
(FINANCIAL ARRANGEMENT) ACT 1982
